items.title: What does best practice care for musculoskeletal pain look like ...
items.summary: A systematic review identified eleven consistent recommendations from high-quality clinical practice guidelines for best practice care in musculoskeletal pain.
items.curatedReason: 这篇系统综述总结了高质量临床实践指南中关于肌肉骨骼疼痛最佳实践的11项一致性建议。它将帮助您快速掌握当前肌肉骨骼疼痛管理的循证核心原则，指导您的临床决策和患者宣教。

items.title: 肩關節鏡術後復健怎麼做才對？旋轉肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩實證指南
items.summary: This guideline from Taiwan offers evidence-based rehabilitation protocols for various shoulder arthroscopy procedures, including rotator cuff repair, Bankart, SLAP, and frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 这篇台湾发布的文章提供了肩关节镜术后（旋转肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩）康复的实证指南。作为临床医师，这份指南能帮助您根据手术类型和损伤程度，制定更精准、更具循证支持的术后康复计划（限台湾地区临床医生）。

items.title: Short-term effects of diaphragmatic myofascial release on pain, mobility, and disability in chronic nonspecific low back pain: a randomized sham-controlled trial | Scientific Reports
items.summary: A randomized sham-controlled trial investigated the short-term effects of diaphragmatic myofascial release on pain, mobility, and disability in chronic nonspecific low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验探讨了膈肌筋膜松解术对慢性非特异性下腰痛的短期效果。如果您在使用或考虑手法治疗，这项研究提供了关于膈肌筋膜松解在缓解疼痛、改善活动度和功能障碍方面的短期证据，对您的治疗选择有参考价值。

items.title: Pelvic floor workout may Reduce Postpartum Stress Urinary Incontinence: JAMA
items.summary: JAMA reported that pelvic floor workouts may reduce postpartum stress urinary incontinence.
items.curatedReason: 《美国医学会杂志》报道指出盆底锻炼可能减少产后压力性尿失禁。这一信息进一步证实了盆底肌训练的临床价值，您可以更有信心地向产后患者推荐和实施盆底康复方案。

items.title: Clinical Neurology: Exercise for falls prevention in Parkinson disease A randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated whether minimally supervised exercise targeting fall risk factors could prevent falls in people with Parkinson disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验旨在确定轻度监督运动是否能预防帕金森病患者跌倒。对于帕金森病患者的跌倒预防是重要的临床挑战，这项研究为您提供了新的循证支持，指导您设计更有效的运动干预方案。

items.title: Mean Arterial Pressure Augmentation for Acute Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Neurological Recovery and Mortality
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated mean arterial pressure augmentation for neurological recovery and mortality in acute traumatic spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了平均动脉压（MAP）增高对急性创伤性脊髓损伤神经恢复和死亡率的影响。鉴于85-90 mmHg的MAP维持是广泛推荐的指南，该研究为您提供了其背后证据的最新审视，对您理解和管理急性SCI患者有重要的临床指导意义。

items.title: Core stability versus postural control training for pain, disability, and sensorimotor function in chronic non-specific low back pain | Scientific Reports
items.summary: This study compared core stability training and postural control training for pain, disability, and sensorimotor function in chronic non-specific low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了核心稳定性训练和姿势控制训练对慢性非特异性下腰痛患者的效果。您可以了解这两种不同训练模式对疼痛、功能障碍和感觉运动功能的影响，从而在临床实践中为患者选择更合适的干预方案。

items.title: GIRFT launches best practice tool to support primary care colleagues to assess and manage patients with spinal pain - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: GIRFT launched an interactive best practice tool for primary care colleagues to assess and manage patients with spinal pain in the UK.
items.curatedReason: GIRFT发布的这款工具旨在支持初级保健医生评估和管理脊柱疼痛患者。虽然主要面向初级保健，但您也可以从中了解英国最新的脊柱疼痛管理流程和推荐，从而优化您的转诊和协同治疗策略（限英国市场）。

items.title: A scoping review of alterations in sensory and motor function, and body perception in women with Chronic Pelvic Pain - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A scoping review identified alterations in sensory and motor function, and body perception in women with chronic pelvic pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述聚焦于慢性盆腔疼痛女性的感觉运动功能和身体知觉改变。作为骨科治疗师，了解这些深层改变有助于您更全面地评估和干预慢性盆腔疼痛患者，尤其是在盆底康复领域。

items.title: Altered central vestibular processing in Parkinson’s disease with Pisa syndrome | Scientific Reports
items.summary: This study identified altered central vestibular processing in Parkinson's disease patients with Pisa syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现帕金森病（PD）伴比萨综合征患者中枢前庭处理存在异常。如果您治疗帕金森病患者，了解前庭系统在姿势不稳和比萨综合征中的作用，将有助于您在评估和干预中更关注前庭康复，从而改善患者的平衡和姿态。

items.title: Frontiers | Spinal cord stimulation to manage autonomic dysfunction after spinal cord injury: a systematic review
items.summary: This systematic review explored spinal cord stimulation to manage autonomic dysfunction after spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这篇系统综述探讨了脊髓电刺激在管理脊髓损伤后自主神经功能障碍方面的应用。如果您治疗脊髓损伤患者，了解这种新兴技术在改善自主神经功能方面的潜力，将有助于您拓宽治疗思路，并关注相关技术进展。

items.title: Cost-utility of long-term exercise therapy in people with axial spondyloarthritis and severe functional limitations: a randomized, controlled trial | Rheumatology International | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This randomized, controlled trial assessed the cost-utility of long-term exercise therapy in people with axial spondyloarthritis and severe functional limitations.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验评估了长期运动疗法对伴有严重功能受限的轴性脊柱关节炎患者的成本效益。如果您关注长期康复的效果和经济性，这项研究可以为您提供运动疗法在这一特定患者群体中的价值证据。

items.title:
Digital Rehabilitation Interventions for Musculoskeletal Disorders: Clinical Effectiveness and Implementation Challenges
							| Quality in Sport
items.summary: This review investigated the clinical effectiveness and implementation challenges of digital rehabilitation interventions for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了数字康复干预在肌肉骨骼疾病中的临床效果和实施挑战。如果您正在探索或使用远程医疗和数字康复工具，它将帮助您理解其现有证据和实践中可能面临的问题。

items.title: Prevalence of Pelvic Floor Dysfunction Symptoms in Female Marathon Runners: A Cross-Sectional Study of the Santiago Marathon, Chile | International Urogynecology Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A cross-sectional study examined the prevalence of pelvic floor dysfunction symptoms in female marathon runners from the Santiago Marathon, Chile.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究调查了女性马拉松跑者盆底功能障碍症状的患病率。如果您从事运动康复，特别是关注女性运动员，这项数据能提醒您在评估和训练中重视盆底健康问题，为高强度运动女性提供更全面的预防和康复指导。

items.title: Cryotherapy combined with standard rehabilitation and early functional recovery after knee arthroplasty: a retrospective cohort study | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study investigated cryotherapy combined with standard rehabilitation for early functional recovery after knee arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究评估了冷疗联合标准康复对膝关节置换术后早期功能恢复的影响。如果您在术后康复中使用冷疗，该研究提供了其在加速恢复方面的证据，尽管是回顾性研究，仍具参考价值。

items.title: Effects of muscle energy technique and positional release technique on low back pain: A comparative study - Journal of Musculoskeletal Surgery and Research
items.summary: This comparative study examined the effects of muscle energy technique and positional release technique on low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项比较研究评估了肌肉能量技术（MET）和姿势释放技术对下腰痛的效果。如果您在临床实践中应用手法治疗，该研究能帮助您了解这两种技术在下腰痛管理中的相对有效性，指导您的手法选择。

items.title: Female participation in randomized controlled trials of motor rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: a systematic review | Spinal Cord
items.summary: A systematic review examined female participation in randomized controlled trials of motor rehabilitation after spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述调查了女性参与脊髓损伤运动康复随机对照试验的情况。如果您参与临床研究或对研究方法感兴趣，该综述提示了研究中性别差异的问题，这对于未来设计更具包容性的临床试验具有重要意义。

items.title: Frontiers | Clinical effectiveness of lumbosacral orthoses in chronic non-specific low back pain: a systematic review
items.summary: A systematic review investigated the clinical effectiveness of lumbosacral orthoses in chronic non-specific low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述评估了腰骶矫形器在慢性非特异性腰痛中的临床效果。如果你在使用或考虑为患者推荐腰骶矫形器，这篇综述能为你提供基于证据的考量，帮助你决策其在特定患者群体中的适用性。

items.title:
Comparative Effects of High-Velocity Low-Amplitude (HVLA) Thrust and Muscle Energy Technique (MET) on Shoulder Mobility and Pain in Patients with Adhesive Capsulitis 
							| Journal of Health, Wellness and Community Research
items.summary: This study compared the effects of high-velocity low-amplitude (HVLA) thrust and muscle energy technique (MET) on shoulder mobility and pain in patients with adhesive capsulitis.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了HVLA推拿和肌肉能量技术在肩关节粘连性囊炎患者中的效果。如果你正在治疗“冻结肩”患者，这篇研究可以为你选择或组合手法治疗提供参考依据。

items.title: Transparency does not equal evidence: a multidimensional quality and guideline concordance analysis of YouTube videos on low back pain self-management | Journal of Public Health | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A study analyzed the quality and guideline concordance of YouTube videos on low back pain self-management, finding that transparency does not always equate to evidence-based content.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分析了YouTube上腰痛自我管理视频的质量和指南一致性。作为PT，你需要警惕患者可能从非专业渠道获取的错误信息，这篇研究能帮助你了解患者信息来源的现状，并能更好地教育患者进行正确的自我管理。

items.title: 基于Transformer-卷积神经网络模型实现单节点腰部康复训练动作识别任务
items.summary: A study proposed a Transformer-Convolutional Neural Network model using a single-node inertial sensor for recognizing lumbar rehabilitation training movements.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提出了一种基于Transformer-卷积神经网络模型，利用单节点惯性传感器实现腰部康复训练动作识别。如果你关注康复技术的未来发展，了解这种利用AI和穿戴设备进行动作识别的技术，可以为你未来的临床实践或研究方向提供启发。

items.title: Sensory Stimulation, Physical Therapy Effective at Improving Gait Performance in PD | AJMC
items.summary: AJMC reported that sensory stimulation and physical therapy are effective at improving gait performance in patients with Parkinson's disease, along with electrical stimulation and balance interventions.
items.curatedReason: AJMC报道了感觉刺激和物理治疗在改善帕金森病步态表现方面的有效性。这篇文章作为回顾性报道，虽然不是原始研究，但它再次确认了多种物理治疗干预（包括电刺激、身体活动、平衡训练）对PD患者步态的积极作用，能增强你临床选择的信心。
